name: Noshtoneer
overview: Aparna's blissful world comes crashing down when she discovers a slanderous allegation against her husband on social media. As she tries to piece things back together, a conflict ensues between the truth-seeking woman and the peace-keeping homemaker in her.

trailers.title: Official Trailer - Noshtoneer (নষ্টনীড়) | Sandipta Sen | 9th June | hoichoi
